title: Discover Your Spiritual Season
description: Answer these questions honestly to discover which spiritual season best reflects where you are right now.
instructions: For each statement, rate how true it feels for you right now on a scale of 1 (Not at all) to 5 (Very much so).

seasons.title: Winter — Stillness & Trust
seasons.description: A season of waiting, rest, and deep trust in God's unseen work.

questions.text: I feel like I am in a quiet or dormant period spiritually.
I am learning to wait on God even when I cannot see what He is doing.
I feel drawn to silence, solitude, and stillness.
I am facing uncertainty and being asked to trust God without clear answers.

seasons.title: Spring — Renewal & Planting
seasons.description: A season of fresh starts, growth, and planting seeds of faith.

questions.text: I sense new beginnings or fresh starts emerging in my life.
I feel God stirring something new in my heart.
I am in a season of learning, growing, and developing spiritually.
I am planting seeds (in relationships, habits, or calling) that I have not yet seen bear fruit.

seasons.title: Summer — Abundance & Joy
seasons.description: A season of flourishing, gratitude, and overflowing joy in God's goodness.

questions.text: I am experiencing a season of abundance, blessing, or fruitfulness.
I feel an overflow of gratitude and joy for what God is doing.
I am seeing prayers answered and seeds I planted bearing fruit.
I feel energized, motivated, and full of faith right now.

seasons.title: Autumn — Harvest & Letting Go
seasons.description: A season of harvest, release, and wise preparation for what comes next.

questions.text: I sense a season of endings, transitions, or letting go.
I am harvesting the results of long obedience — good and difficult.
I feel a call to release things (relationships, dreams, roles) that have run their course.
I am reflecting on what truly matters and simplifying my life around it.

winter.title: You are in a Winter Season
winter.message: Winter is not a sign of spiritual failure — it is an invitation to trust. God is doing deep root-work that you cannot yet see. This season is holy.
winter.encouragement: Be still, and know that I am God. — Psalm 46:10

spring.title: You are in a Spring Season
spring.message: Something new is springing up in your life! Spring is a time of hope, growth, and fresh starts. Tend the seeds God is planting in you.
spring.encouragement: See, I am doing a new thing! Now it springs up; do you not perceive it? — Isaiah 43:19

summer.title: You are in a Summer Season
summer.message: You are flourishing! Summer is a season to celebrate God's goodness, share your abundance, and invest generously in others from the overflow.
summer.encouragement: The joy of the Lord is your strength. — Nehemiah 8:10

autumn.title: You are in an Autumn Season
autumn.message: Autumn is a season of wisdom and holy release. Let go of what is finished so that room is made for what is coming. Trust the harvest God is bringing in.
autumn.encouragement: There is a time for everything, and a season for every activity under the heavens. — Ecclesiastes 3:1
